name: AMC Global Media Inc.
business: AMC Networks Inc. is a global entertainment company that distributes content to audiences via linear networks, subscription streaming services, ad-supported streaming platforms, and licensing arrangements. It operates through two segments: Domestic Operations (programming networks, streaming services, AMC Studios, and film distribution) and International (international programming businesses). The company's revenue is derived from subscription fees, advertising sales, and content licensing.
sellsTo: cable and other multichannel video programming distributors

exposures.sentence: AMC Networks is a global entertainment company known for its popular and award-winning content.

We face continually evolving cybersecurity and other technology-related risks, which could result in the disclosure, theft, destruction or misappropriation of, or access to, confidential information, disruption of our programming, damage to our brands and reputation, legal exposure and financial losses.
Additionally, new technological developments, including the development and use of generative artificial intelligence ( AI ) and large language model tools, are rapidly evolving.

catalysts.event: Premiere of new series 'The Audacity' on AMC
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, AMC is set to introduce The Audacity, a darkly comedic Silicon Valley-set drama series featuring an all-star cast led by Billy Magnussen, with Zach Galifianakis, Sarah Goldberg, Rob Corddry, Simon Helberg and others.

catalysts.event: Premiere of 'Dark Winds' season four on AMC
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, AMC will present the fourth season of Dark Winds, perhaps the most ambitious Native-led TV show ever made, according to The Hollywood Reporter, starring Zahn McClarnon and executive produced by Robert Redford and George R.R. Martin.

catalysts.event: Launch of new series 'You're Killing Me' on Acorn TV
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, Acorn TV is set to debut the highly anticipated Brooke Shields-led mystery series You're Killing Me, also starring Golden Globe-nominated Tom Cavanaugh and up-and-coming Amalia Williamson from the hit series Sullivan's Crossing.

catalysts.event: Relaunch of Sundance Now as a premier streaming destination for independent film
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, Sundance Now is expected to relaunch as a premier streaming destination for independent film, with an enhanced platform featuring more than 1,000 hours of critically acclaimed dramas, documentaries and arthouse films curated by and for film enthusiasts, new monthly theatrical releases, and festival favorites and more at the 2026 Sundance Film Festival where the streaming service is an official sponsor.
